changes: Fixed a failed app update being able to delete your existing installed copy of Omi
Fixed audio from Bee devices gradually drifting out of sync during longer recordings
Fixed starring or renaming a conversation briefly reverting when you switch filters on a slow connection
Fixed the movable floating bar drifting out of position after repeated Ask Omi queries
Personalized home suggestions now retry after a network outage instead of staying empty for the rest of the day
Fixed personalized home suggestions so switching accounts mid-refresh can never show or store another account's questions
Fixed a startup crash that could occur while checking notification permissions
Home suggestions now open with "What should I do today?" followed by two questions personalized from your memories, tasks, and goals
Fixed already-synced device recordings never being cleaned up, which grew disk usage over time
Fixed device recordings occasionally getting stuck and never finishing sync after an authentication hiccup
Improved reliability of macOS beta qualification retries by starting each run with a clean synthetic profile
